layout_and_spacing.base_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-px bg-slate-200 border border-slate-200

surfaces.borders: Expose the grid skeleton using 1px borders everywhere. Avoid card shadows.

motion_and_interaction.animations: Minimal. Fast micro-interactions for feedback. No slow fades.

components.buttons: rounded-sm font-semibold tracking-tight uppercase text-xs px-4 py-2
components.badges: rounded-none text-xs uppercase tracking-widest px-2 py-1 font-bold
components.tables: Dense, text-sm, strict horizontal borders only. Striped rows on hover.
components.graphs: Use React Flow (@xyflow/react) for interactive node relationship mapping. Use Recharts for analytical widgets.
components.search: Prominent Command-K style interface or massive brutalist input field.

image_urls.description: Minimalist black and white geometric pattern of modern architecture. Perfect for an authoritative login page.
Abstract red and white geometric shape. Can be used as a small accent mark or branding banner if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic: sharp edges (max rounded-sm), zero soft shadows, 1px strict borders.
Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react` for dense, professional icons.
Run `yarn add @xyflow/react` to implement the 2-hop relationship graph. It is the best choice for OSINT entity mapping.
Run `yarn add recharts` for any additional data visualizations.
The Red Flag Detection should heavily utilize the DC2626 (Signal Red) color against stark white to create immediate visual tension and urgency.
Search functionality must be front-and-center (e.g., a massive input or a Command-K modal).
Do not use generic Inter font. Import and use IBM Plex Sans exclusively for UI text and IBM Plex Mono for data strings.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes for testing.
Ensure tables are highly compact for data scannability.
